top3.sql:
WITH czk_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS czk_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
eur_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS eur_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT czk_total FROM czk_consumption) - (SELECT eur_total FROM eur_consumption) AS consumption_difference

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012') -
    (SELECT AVG(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012') AS consumption_difference

WITH czk_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS czk_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
eur_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS eur_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
)
SELECT czk_total - eur_total AS consumption_difference
FROM czk_consumption, eur_consumption

WITH czk_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS czk_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
eur_consumption AS (
    SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) AS eur_total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT czk_total FROM czk_consumption) - (SELECT eur_total FROM eur_consumption) AS consumption_difference
